[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 12/12 (Tue)!

Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 12/12 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/19 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
